articles.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
articles.description: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

articles.title: Kodiak AI raises $100M at a steep discount, sending its stock tumbling 37%
articles.description: The company made a series of other announcements during earnings, including a new commercial contract, a pilot program in Canada, and a collaboration.

articles.title: Disney looking to make a unified ‘super app,’ report says
articles.description: Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro, who took over for Bob Iger earlier this year, has emphasized his intent to streamline the Disney experience.

articles.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
articles.description: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

articles.title: Hackers deface school login pages after claiming another Instructure hack
articles.description: The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claimed to have hacked Instructure again, defacing the login pages of several Instructure customer schools with an extortion message.

articles.title: Gusto hits $1B revenue, a figure that brings it closer to public markets
articles.description: Gusto has shared an impressive milestone on its actual revenue, not an ARR number that estimates future income.

articles.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
articles.description: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

articles.title: Tesla Model Y is first car to meet new US driver assistance safety benchmark
articles.description: The new benchmark rating applies to 2026 Tesla Model Y vehicles assembled on or after November 12, 2025.

articles.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
articles.description: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
articles.description: Elon Musk's legal effort to dismantle OpenAI may hinge on how its for-profit subsidiary enhances or detracts from the frontier lab's founding mission of ensuring that humanity benefits from artificial general intelligence.

articles.title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
articles.description: Based on Whitney Wolfe Herd's past comments about Bumble's new direction, the company is expected to lean into AI -- Bumble is even working on an AI dating assistant called Bee, and the CEO has made many comments over the years about how AI will be "a supercharger to love and relationships."

articles.title: Tome, another Goodreads book-tracker rival, shuts down
articles.description: Built on the back of the sizable and influential BookTok community -- creators who discuss and review books on TikTok -- the app offered readers a place to chronicle and rate their books, get recommendations, and even add photos of things like favorite quotes or memes, or share playlists that match the book's vibes.

articles.title: Could Lovable’s automatic 10% pay raise be the cure for toxic cultures?
articles.description: Stockholm-based vibe-coding platform Lovable is offering employees an automatic 10% raise as a way to sidestep classic corporate politics.

articles.title: Hackers hack victims hacked by other hackers
articles.description: An unknown group of hackers is breaking into systems previously breached by the cybercrime group TeamPCP. Once inside, the hackers immediately kick out TeamPCP and remove its hacking tools from the victims’ systems.

articles.title: Kalshi doubles valuation in 5 months, hitting $22B
articles.description: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos rep leaves Slate Auto’s board
articles.description: Melinda Lewison's departure raises questions about Bezos' support and involvement with the startup at a time when the Amazon founder is now apparently focused on robotics at his new startup, Project Prometheus.

articles.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
articles.description: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.

articles.title: Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
articles.description: The Gemini-powered health coach will act as a combination fitness coach, sleep expert, and health and wellness advisor.

articles.title: Google unveils Whoop-like screenless Fitbit Air
articles.description: The device comes with health and fitness tracking like 24/7 heart rate, heart rhythm monitoring with A-fib alerts, SpO2, resting heart rate, heart rate variability, sleep stages and duration, and more.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27: A shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
articles.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications are open, but only for three more weeks. Apply by May 27 for your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, $100,000 equity-free, and more opportunities for major scaling impact.

articles.title: DHS can’t create vast DNA database to track ICE critics, lawsuit says
articles.description: Lawsuit accuses DHS of plugging DNA database into ICE surveillance machine.

articles.title: Mozilla says 271 vulnerabilities found by Mythos have "almost no false positives"
articles.description: The developer of Firefox says it has "completely bought in" on AI-assisted bug discovery.

articles.title: Google unveils screenless Fitbit Air and Google Health app to replace Fitbit
articles.description: The $100 Fitbit Air is available for preorder today.

articles.title: RIP social media. What comes next is messy.
articles.description: As social media splinters, how can we keep the new online spaces from devolving into toxic pits of despair?

articles.title: Elon Musk tried to hire OpenAI founders to start AI unit inside Tesla
articles.description: Musk was “prepared to do the for-profit, provided he would get control.”

articles.title: Is your Porsche Taycan too slow at the Nürburgring? You need this Manthey Kit.

articles.title: Former NASA chief takes helm of national security space firm
articles.description: "The spacecraft can also be refueled, and it can refuel others."

articles.title: SpaceX is starting to move on from the world's most successful rocket
articles.description: Vandenberg Space Force Base in California is set to become SpaceX's busiest launch site—for now.

articles.title: Anthropic raises Claude Code usage limits, credits new deal with SpaceX
articles.description: Deal follows others with Microsoft, Amazon, and more.

articles.title: TSMC taps wind power as AI chip demand soars, Taiwan feels energy crunch
articles.description: TSMC backs renewables during record demand for energy-hungry chip manufacturing.

articles.title: Court strikes down FCC anti-discrimination rule opposed by Internet providers
articles.description: Chairman Brendan Carr celebrates FCC court loss in case over Biden-era rule.

articles.title: Spooked by Mythos, Trump suddenly realized AI safety testing might be good
articles.description: Trump forced to admit Biden was right on AI safety testing.

articles.title: Report: SpaceX IPO gives Musk unchecked power and forbids investor lawsuits
articles.description: Anyone who buys into SpaceX IPO must waive right to sue the firm, report says.

articles.title: Google DeepMind partners with EVE Online for AI model testing
articles.description: Move comes as CCP Games spends $120M to go independent, rebrands as Fenris Creations.

articles.title: The animated version of the iconic "Hello, world" image reveals striking new details

articles.title: FDA vaccine studies censored by Trump admin after finding benefits of shots
articles.description: FDA has suppressed studies on COVID-19 vaccines and Shingrix, a shingles vaccine.

articles.title: Anthropic's Claude Managed Agents can now "dream," sort of

articles.title: Google's Gemma 4 AI models get 3x speed boost by predicting future tokens
articles.description: Up to 3x the speed with no loss of quality—is it too good to be true?

articles.title: Here's what has to happen if NASA wants to land on the Moon every month
articles.description: NASA is serious about taking more shots on goal, but some of them need to start landing.

articles.title: Infants are bleeding out after parents decline vitamin K shots given at birth
articles.description: Hospitals report more parents are declining vitamin K shots for their newborns.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. OpenAI推出API新语音智能功能，并引入“可信联系人”安全机制以应对自伤风险，同时马斯克诉讼案使其安全记录受到审视。
2. Kodiak AI以大幅折价融资1亿美元，股价暴跌37%；Kalshi在5个月内估值翻倍至220亿美元。
3. 迪士尼计划打造统一“超级应用”；Gusto营收突破10亿美元，接近上市门槛；特斯拉Model Y成为首款符合美国新辅助驾驶安全标准的车型。
4. 黑客在声称再次攻击Instructure后，篡改学校登录页面；另出现“黑客被其他黑客攻击”的连环事件。
5. Bumble CEO称将取消滑动匹配功能；Stockholm AI初创公司Pit成为新星；Mac版Perplexity个人电脑全面开放；Goodreads竞争者Tome关闭；Lovable的自动加薪10%被探讨能否改善企业文化。

今日最值得关注的发展：OpenAI在语音功能和安全机制上双重推进，同时面临法律与安全审视，凸显AI行业在创新与监管间的激烈博弈。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **模型迭代与安全性**：vLLM从V0到V1版本强调RL中先确保正确性再修正；OpenAI推出GPT-5.5及GPT-5.5-Cyber模型，用于扩展网络可信访问。
2. **语音与搜索技术**：OpenAI在API中推出新语音智能模型；Hugging Face为开放ASR排行榜增加防作弊机制；Google搜索新增园艺技巧功能。
3. **AI应用与商业化**：Uber、Singular Bank、Parloa等企业利用OpenAI模型提升服务效率；ChatGPT开始测试广告、推出可信联系人功能及“Futures: Class of 2026”计划。
4. **行业竞赛与合作**：Google与XPRIZE合作设立350万美元未来视觉电影竞赛；OpenAI分析前沿AI公司如何拉开差距。
5. **开发者工具优化**：Gemini API新增Webhooks功能，降低长期运行任务的延迟与摩擦。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI密集发布GPT-5.5系列、ChatGPT广告测试及可信联系人功能，标志着其从技术研发向商业化与用户信任体系同步加速推进。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **中美关系与科技竞争**：中美双方正寻求为人工智能（AI）竞争设立“护栏”，防止危机升级；同时有报道称，中国网络能力已与美国相当，荷兰情报机构对此发出警告。此外，中美在应对共同敌人方面存在合作空间。

2. **中国科技与市场动态**：中国计划以约500亿美元估值投资DeepSeek，字节跳动旗下AI产品“豆包”在中国测试付费订阅模式；三星因市场份额萎缩退出中国家电销售，福特正与吉利就出售部分欧盟工厂进行“非常深入”的谈判。

3. **社会与舆论焦点**：中国青年正逐渐远离“内卷”竞争；美国华盛顿特区枪击案嫌犯在写给家人的信中表达对美国政府的不满；有外媒报道称中国正在退出“马努斯协议”，凸显美国某项优势。

4. **国际与安全议题**：中国东方航空MU5735航班相关NTSB文件被披露；美国AP揭露美国科技巨头在中国“数字警察国家”中的角色；中国在AI领域的投资与商业化进程加速推进。

今日最值得关注的发展是：中美在AI领域竞相设立规则与投资，同时中国本土AI企业DeepSeek估值大幅攀升，反映全球科技竞争格局正加速演变。
